text: As I wander through this modern, glass-walled corridor, I can't help but feel a sense of curiosity, as if I'm on the threshold of discovery. The bright colors, digital displays, and bold "R+D" signage hint at innovation and experimentation. I feel small but energized, as if I'm stepping into a place where ideas are cultivated and possibilities are endless. There is an atmosphere of anticipation—perhaps I'll learn something new about our relationship with technology and development. I feel eager to engage and reflect.
